answers.command_log_evidence: partial: run manifest and relation_balanced_kg_pipeline.out confirm execution, WDQS backend, 139 collection starts/finishes, and 1137 successful WDQS POST lines; no exact shell command found.
answers.did_stage2_query_wdqs_read_cache_or_both: queried_live_wdqs_for_candidate_collection; produced local shards/checkpoints afterward; no local candidate_input_path was configured.
answers.stage2_allocation_evidence: stage_collect_candidates loads ctx.config.allocated_relations_path; run manifest path is src/kg_builder/input/bidirectional_allocation_results5k.json; hash matches selected final graph allocation.
answers.stage2_stage1_consumption_evidence: stage_collect_candidates reads ctx.run_dir/stage01_genericity/relation_genericity.jsonl into genericity_map before annotating candidates.

code_findings: Stage1 loads allocated_relations_path and support_matrix_path, then writes stage01_genericity/relation_genericity.jsonl and summary.json.
Stage2 loads allocated_relations_path and stage01_genericity/relation_genericity.jsonl, builds candidate source from config, and writes per-relation shards/checkpoints.
With candidate_source_mode=wdqs and candidate_input_path=null, build_candidate_source returns WDQSCandidateSource.
WDQSCandidateSource posts SELECT DISTINCT ?h ?t queries to wdqs_endpoint with LIMIT/OFFSET pagination.
Stage4 reads ctx.run_dir/stage02_candidates/shards directly, not Stage3 audit rows.

log_evidence.note: relation_balanced_kg_pipeline.out contains WDQS collection logs and final printed run_dir, but no literal shell command line was found.

no_mutation_statement: This provenance JSON was created from local file inspection only. No WDQS/LLM calls or graph generation were performed.

stage02_candidate_pool_profile.evidence_for_or_against: Archived pipeline code constructs Stage4 from ctx.run_dir/stage02_candidates/shards; Stage4 core triples are a subset of the combined shard triple set.

stage2_to_stage4_link_from_R2_5.stage3_to_stage4_interpretation: Partial. The archived pipeline code and run manifest confirm Stage3 candidate audit precedes Stage4, and Stage4 construction reads the frozen Stage2 candidate shard directory. Stage4 core triples are a subset of the combined Stage2 candidate shards. The Stage3 audit artifact itself is relation-level and contains no h/r/t triples, so it is not a direct graph input to Stage4.

unreproducibility_and_gaps: Stage2 candidate collection used live WDQS, so exact rerun can drift with endpoint contents, ordering, throttling, and availability.
The production log does not preserve literal SPARQL text per request, only HTTP POST success lines and relation-level collection summaries.
No exact shell/SLURM command line for the production run was found in the copied archive.
No WDQS response cache was identified for replaying Stage2 without network.
Environment/package lock remains incomplete beyond manifest python_version and archived source/config files.
